data.content:
Here's your migrated project file using MSTest.Sdk:

```xml
<Project Sdk="MSTest.Sdk/3.6.3">
  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>
  </PropertyGroup>
</Project>
```

**What changed:**

1. **SDK** — switched from `Microsoft.NET.Sdk` to `MSTest.Sdk/3.6.3`
2. **Removed all MSTest PackageReferences** — `MSTest.Sdk` automatically brings in `MSTest.TestFramework`, `MSTest.TestAdapter`, and `Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk`
3. **Removed `IsPackable`** — the MSTest SDK sets this to `false` by default

Your test code (`UserServiceTests.cs`) requires no changes — the `[TestClass]`, `[TestMethod]`, `[DataRow]`, and `[Timeout]` attributes all work the same in MSTest v3.

Shall I apply this change to your project file?
